description: Only e2e p90 exceeds its budget, so exactly the e2e_p90_over_budget check fires.

transcript_object.content: Thanks for calling Acme Wellness, this is Ava. How can I help you today?
I'd like to know about the signature facial.
It's a 60-minute customized facial with a licensed esthetician. Would you like to book one?
Of course. Thanks for calling Acme Wellness!
